title: Verify WhatsApp/Push Notification for Reminder
description: Test the integration that sends a notification 24 hours before trial expiry after a user sets a reminder.
preconditions: User's trial is configured to end in 24 hours and 1 minute.
User has provided consent for WhatsApp/Push notifications.

steps.description: 1. Set the reminder for the user account.
2. Wait for the system time to pass the 24-hour-to-expiry threshold.
3. Check the user's registered device/WhatsApp for a notification.

expected_result: The user receives a notification on the correct channel (WhatsApp/Push) with a message informing them their trial is ending soon and providing an option to manage their subscription.
